appliedUpdates.description: Added Phase 3 Assessment Engine guidance with 5 surfaces: Drill Mode, Diagnostic Mode, Results Summary, Mastery Tracking, Study Sessions

systemicIssues.description: CRITICAL BUG: Answer options (multiple choice A/B/C/D) are NOT rendered in drill questions. The question card HTML shows only the question text, tags, and hints - but NO answer choices. This completely blocks drill completion and all downstream assertions (Results Summary, Mastery Tracking).
systemicIssues.rootCause: Answer options are rendered as <span> elements with CSS styling (bg-purple-100 class) rather than <button> elements. The onClick handler is not properly wired to React state.
systemicIssues.suggestedFix: Fix the answer option component to render as <button> elements or properly wire the onClick handler to React state for <span> elements.

systemicIssues.description: Diagnostic sessions are not persisted to IndexedDB. Navigating away loses all progress.
systemicIssues.suggestedFix: Ensure diagnostic session state is saved to IndexedDB on each answer submission.

systemicIssues.description: View Report button in diagnostic mode does nothing when clicked.
systemicIssues.suggestedFix: Wire up the View Report button to navigate to or display the diagnostic report.

systemicIssues.description: Session record missing duration field. startedAt and endedAt are stored, allowing manual calculation, but duration field is not persisted.
systemicIssues.suggestedFix: Add duration field calculation: duration = endedAt - startedAt (in seconds) and persist it to the session record.

systemicIssues.description: Topic selection shows 6 topics instead of 10 lectures. This may be intentional grouping but doesn't match assertion spec.
systemicIssues.suggestedFix: If 10 individual lectures should be selectable, update the topic selection UI. If grouping is intentional, update the validation contract.
